spec.rawSql:
WITH grouped_sessions AS (
    SELECT 
        sh.reference_id,
        sh.media_type,
        shm.title,
        shm.grandparent_title,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)) as duration
    FROM session_history sh
    JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
    WHERE sh.stopped > 0
        AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
        AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
        -- User Filter
        AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
        -- Content Type Filter
        AND (
            '${content_type}' = 'all'
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies' AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'music' AND sh.media_type = 'track')
        )
        -- Series Filter (nur für episodes)
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
            OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
        )
        -- Movie Filter (nur für movies)
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'movies'
            OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
        )
        -- Artist Filter (nur für music)
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'music'
            OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
        )
    GROUP BY sh.reference_id, sh.media_type, shm.title, shm.grandparent_title
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT 
        -- Bei 'all': Füge Content Type Tag hinzu, sonst normal
        CASE 
            WHEN '${content_type}' = 'all' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN grandparent_title || ' [TV]'
                    WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN title || ' [Movie]'
                    WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN grandparent_title || ' [Music]'
                END
            ELSE
                CASE 
                    WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN grandparent_title
                    WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN title
                    WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN grandparent_title
                END
        END as "Title",
        COUNT(*) as plays,
        ROUND(SUM(duration) / 3600.0, 1) as hours
    FROM grouped_sessions
    GROUP BY 
        CASE 
            WHEN '${content_type}' = 'all' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN grandparent_title || ' [TV]'
                    WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN title || ' [Movie]'
                    WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN grandparent_title || ' [Music]'
                END
            ELSE
                CASE 
                    WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN grandparent_title
                    WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN title
                    WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN grandparent_title
                END
        END,
        media_type
)
SELECT 
    "Title",
    CASE 
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'plays' THEN plays
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'hours' THEN hours::integer
    END as "Value"
FROM aggregated
WHERE "Title" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'plays' THEN plays
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'hours' THEN hours::integer
    END DESC
LIMIT COALESCE(NULLIF(${top_limit}, 0), 999999)

WITH grouped_sessions AS (
    SELECT 
        sh.reference_id,
        sh."user",
        sh.media_type,
        shm.title,
        shm.grandparent_title,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)) as duration
    FROM session_history sh
    JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
    WHERE sh.stopped > 0
        AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
        AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
        AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
        AND (
            '${content_type}' = 'all'
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies' AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'music' AND sh.media_type = 'track')
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
            OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'movies'
            OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'music'
            OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
        )
    GROUP BY sh.reference_id, sh."user", sh.media_type, shm.title, shm.grandparent_title
)
SELECT 
    "user" as "User",
    CASE 
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'plays' THEN COUNT(DISTINCT reference_id)
        WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'hours' THEN ROUND(SUM(duration) / 3600.0)::integer
    END as "Value"
FROM grouped_sessions
GROUP BY "user"
ORDER BY "Value" DESC
LIMIT COALESCE(NULLIF(${top_limit}, 0), 999999)

WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__from} / 1000)),
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__to} / 1000)),
    ('1 ' || ${interval_group:singlequote})::interval
  ) AS "time"
),
grouped_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    sh.reference_id,
    sh.media_type,
    ls.section_name,
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(sh.started)) AS "time",
    SUM(
      CASE WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) ELSE 0 END
    ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)) AS duration
  FROM session_history sh
  JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
  LEFT JOIN library_sections ls ON sh.section_id = ls.section_id
  WHERE sh.stopped > 0
    AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
    AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
    AND (
      '${content_type}' = 'all'
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies'   AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'music'    AND sh.media_type = 'track')
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
      OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'movies'
      OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'music'
      OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
    )
    AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    "time",
    CASE
      WHEN ${detail_level:singlequote} = 'type' THEN
        CASE media_type
          WHEN 'episode' THEN 'TV Shows'
          WHEN 'movie'   THEN 'Movies'
          WHEN 'track'   THEN 'Music'
          ELSE 'Other'
        END

      WHEN ${detail_level:singlequote} = 'library' THEN
        CASE
          WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN
            'TV - ' ||
            CASE
              WHEN lower(COALESCE(section_name,'')) LIKE '%anime%' THEN 'Anime'
              ELSE COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
            END
          WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN 'Movies - ' || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
          WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN 'Music - '  || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
          ELSE 'Other - ' || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
        END

      ELSE 'TV Shows'
    END AS metric,

    COUNT(DISTINCT reference_id) AS plays,
    ROUND(SUM(duration) / 3600.0, 1) AS hours
  FROM grouped_sessions
  GROUP BY 1,2
),
all_metrics AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM stats
),
time_metric_matrix AS (
  SELECT ts.time, am.metric
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN all_metrics am
)
SELECT
  tmm.time,
  tmm.metric,
  COALESCE(
    CASE
      WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'plays' THEN s.plays
      WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'hours' THEN s.hours::integer
    END,
    0
  ) AS value
FROM time_metric_matrix tmm
LEFT JOIN stats s
  ON tmm.time = s.time AND tmm.metric = s.metric
ORDER BY tmm.time, tmm.metric;

WITH time_series AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__from} / 1000)),
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__to} / 1000)),
    ('1 ' || ${interval_group:singlequote})::interval
  ) AS "time"
),
grouped_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    sh.reference_id,
    sh.media_type,
    ls.section_name,
    date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(sh.started)) AS "time",
    SUM(
      CASE WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) ELSE 0 END
    ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)) AS duration
  FROM session_history sh
  JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
  LEFT JOIN library_sections ls ON sh.section_id = ls.section_id
  WHERE sh.stopped > 0
    AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
    AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
    AND (
      '${content_type}' = 'all'
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies'   AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
      OR ('${content_type}' = 'music'    AND sh.media_type = 'track')
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
      OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'movies'
      OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
      '${content_type}' != 'music'
      OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
      OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
    )
    AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    "time",
    CASE
      WHEN ${detail_level:singlequote} = 'type' THEN
        CASE media_type
          WHEN 'episode' THEN 'TV Shows'
          WHEN 'movie'   THEN 'Movies'
          WHEN 'track'   THEN 'Music'
          ELSE 'Other'
        END

      WHEN ${detail_level:singlequote} = 'library' THEN
        CASE
          WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN
            'TV - ' ||
            CASE
              WHEN lower(COALESCE(section_name,'')) LIKE '%anime%' THEN 'Anime'
              ELSE COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
            END
          WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN 'Movies - ' || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
          WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN 'Music - '  || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
          ELSE 'Other - ' || COALESCE(section_name, 'Unknown')
        END

      ELSE 'TV Shows'
    END AS metric,

    COUNT(DISTINCT reference_id) AS plays,
    ROUND(SUM(duration) / 3600.0, 1) AS hours
  FROM grouped_sessions
  GROUP BY 1,2
),
all_metrics AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM stats
),
time_metric_matrix AS (
  SELECT ts.time, am.metric
  FROM time_series ts
  CROSS JOIN all_metrics am
)
SELECT
  tmm.time,
  tmm.metric,
  COALESCE(
    CASE
      WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'plays' THEN s.plays
      WHEN ${top_sort_by:singlequote} = 'hours' THEN s.hours::integer
    END,
    0
  ) AS value
FROM time_metric_matrix tmm
LEFT JOIN stats s
  ON tmm.time = s.time AND tmm.metric = s.metric
ORDER BY tmm.time, tmm.metric;

WITH time_series AS (
    SELECT generate_series(
        date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__from} / 1000)),
        date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(${__to} / 1000)),
        ('1 ' || ${interval_group:singlequote})::interval
    ) AS "time"
),
watch_data AS (
    SELECT
        date_trunc(${interval_group:singlequote}, to_timestamp(sh.started)) AS "time",
        COUNT(DISTINCT sh.reference_id) AS "Anzahl Plays",
        ROUND(
            (SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                    ELSE 0 
                END
            ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0))) / 60.0,
            1
        ) AS "Watch Minutes",
        ROUND(
            (SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                    ELSE 0 
                END
            ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0))) / 3600.0,
            2
        ) AS "Watch Hours",
        ROUND(
            AVG(
                CASE 
                    WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) - COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)
                    ELSE NULL
                END
            ) / 60.0,
            1
        ) AS "Avg Minutes per Play"
    FROM session_history sh
    JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
    WHERE sh.stopped > 0
        AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
        AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
        AND (
            '${content_type}' = 'all'
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies' AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'music' AND sh.media_type = 'track')
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
            OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'movies'
            OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'music'
            OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
        )
        AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT 
    ts.time,
    COALESCE(wd."Anzahl Plays", 0) AS "Anzahl Plays",
    COALESCE(wd."Watch Minutes", 0) AS "Watch Minutes",
    COALESCE(wd."Watch Hours", 0) AS "Watch Hours",
    COALESCE(wd."Avg Minutes per Play", 0) AS "Avg Minutes per Play"
FROM time_series ts
LEFT JOIN watch_data wd ON ts.time = wd.time
ORDER BY ts.time

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT sh.reference_id) as "Total Plays",
    
    COUNT(DISTINCT sh."user") as "Unique Users",
    
    COUNT(DISTINCT 
        CASE 
            WHEN sh.media_type = 'episode' THEN shm.grandparent_title
            WHEN sh.media_type = 'movie' THEN shm.title
            WHEN sh.media_type = 'track' THEN shm.grandparent_title
        END
    ) as "Unique Titles",
    
    ROUND(
        (SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0))) / 3600.0,
        1
    ) as "Total Hours",
    
    ROUND(
        (SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0))) / 86400.0,
        1
    ) as "Total Days",
    
    ROUND(
        AVG(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) - COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)
                ELSE NULL
            END
        ) / 60.0,
        1
    ) as "Avg Minutes per Play",
    
    COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(to_timestamp(sh.started))) as "Active Days"

FROM session_history sh
JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
WHERE sh.stopped > 0
    AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
    AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
    AND (
        '${content_type}' = 'all'
        OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
        OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies' AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
        OR ('${content_type}' = 'music' AND sh.media_type = 'track')
    )
    AND (
        '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
        OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
        OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
        '${content_type}' != 'movies'
        OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
        OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
    )
    AND (
        '${content_type}' != 'music'
        OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
        OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
    )
    AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)

WITH grouped_sessions AS (
    -- Gruppiere nach reference_id um Sessions zusammenzufassen
    SELECT 
        sh.reference_id,
        sh.media_type,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN sh.stopped > 0 THEN (sh.stopped - sh.started) 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) - SUM(COALESCE(sh.paused_counter, 0)) as duration
    FROM session_history sh
    JOIN session_history_metadata shm ON sh.id = shm.id
    WHERE sh.stopped > 0
        AND (sh.stopped - sh.started) >= ${ignore_interval}
        AND ($g$${user}$g$ = 'All' OR sh."user" IN (${user:sqlstring}))
        AND (
            '${content_type}' = 'all'
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'episodes' AND sh.media_type = 'episode')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'movies' AND sh.media_type = 'movie')
            OR ('${content_type}' = 'music' AND sh.media_type = 'track')
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'episodes'
            OR $g$${series}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${series:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'movies'
            OR $g$${movie}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.title IN (${movie:sqlstring})
        )
        AND (
            '${content_type}' != 'music'
            OR $g$${artist}$g$ = 'All'
            OR shm.grandparent_title IN (${artist:sqlstring})
        )
        AND sh.started BETWEEN (${__from} / 1000) AND (${__to} / 1000)
    GROUP BY sh.reference_id, sh.media_type
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN media_type = 'episode' THEN 'TV Shows'
        WHEN media_type = 'movie' THEN 'Movies'
        WHEN media_type = 'track' THEN 'Music'
        ELSE media_type
    END as "Content Type",
    
    COUNT(*) as "Plays",
    
    ROUND(SUM(duration) / 3600.0, 1) as "Hours",
    
    ROUND(AVG(duration) / 60.0, 1) as "Avg Minutes",
    
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) as "% of Total"

FROM grouped_sessions
GROUP BY media_type
ORDER BY "Hours" DESC

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT "user" 
FROM session_history 
WHERE "user" IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY "user"
spec.name: user

spec.__legacyStringValue:
SELECT DISTINCT "user" 
FROM session_history 
WHERE "user" IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY "user"

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT shm.grandparent_title 
FROM session_history_metadata shm
JOIN session_history sh ON sh.id = shm.id
WHERE shm.grandparent_title IS NOT NULL 
  AND shm.grandparent_title != ''
  AND sh.media_type = 'episode'
ORDER BY shm.grandparent_title
spec.name: series

  AND sh.media_type = 'episode'
ORDER BY shm.grandparent_title

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT shm.title 
FROM session_history_metadata shm
JOIN session_history sh ON sh.id = shm.id
WHERE sh.media_type = 'movie'
  AND shm.title IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY shm.title

spec.name: artist

SELECT DISTINCT shm.grandparent_title 
FROM session_history_metadata shm
JOIN session_history sh ON sh.id = shm.id
WHERE sh.media_type = 'track'
  AND shm.grandparent_title IS NOT NULL
